LanguageData.UB_SNS_RimBorne.title: Horse thief
LanguageData.UB_SNS_RimBorne.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was an adventurer in an outer rimworld. During a large conflict between two factions, [PAWN_nameDef] was accused of stealing a horse and arrested. [PAWN_pronoun] later was pardoned and freed after their execution was interrupted by a large mechanoid beast, who laid siege to the town.
